original: This battlefield nurse outfit comes with multiple extras to facilitate rescue and revival during the wartime conditions. Shield micro-emitters provide protection against oncoming fire and dangerous wildlife while temporary hardlight wing projectors allow for short glides across inhospitable terrain. To prevent the loss of valuable trained medical professionals, this suit comes with a trademark “Superior Emergency Critical System,” capable of delivering a potent liquid suppository of recovery agents, prototype arousal suppressants, and tissue-repair microsurgeons in emergency. More than one battlefield legend of a medic coming back from apparent death can be traced back to the timely application of the S.E.C.S. system! A product of J’ejune Pharmaceutical SECS requires anal access to activate - Codex->Extras->SECS for more information. Known to cause moderate amounts of taint. Check your Codex for details.
